rows.label: tev045201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev045201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Selia what the Bias think of BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev045201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Selia about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_JNK1010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev045201_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Selia about the Bias's fighting style.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_JNK1020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev045201_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Selia about recent developments.

rows.label: tev045201_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask Selia about Zarch Quokett.

rows.label: tev045201_SEL1041
rows.name: Ask Selia about Zarch Quokett.

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0001
rows.name:
BLADEs have already toppled
several Cavern Clan fortresses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0002
rows.name:
Tree Clan has battled Cavern Clan for
10,000 suns. We know well their strength.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0003
rows.name:
So we also do not doubt your strength.
We know your victories were not easy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0004
rows.name:
But remember that we are still
warriors. We will not spend lazy
days on this ship forever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0005
rows.name:
Soon we will take up arms and help
you bring enemy fortress down![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0008
rows.name: You call beasts of Mira "indigens," yes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0009
rows.name:
We have been trying to tame
these...indigens. Just as we once
tamed beasts of our homeworld.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0010
rows.name:
But we struggle. Our usual incense
does not put Mira's beasts to sleep.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0011
rows.name:
Yet Bias have lived and died with
beasts since dawn of time. We take
pride in uncovering their weaknesses![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0012
rows.name:
Zarch Quokett was our homeworld's
finest beastmaster. Later I
will speak with him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0013
rows.name:
I tried Earth weapons. I do not
like them. They are not for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0018
rows.name:
Best way to fight is to tame beast.
Then let beast do fighting for you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0019
rows.name: I must find way to master Mira's beasts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0020
rows.name:
Zarch Quokett was our homeworld's
finest beastmaster. Later I
will speak with him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0014
rows.name:
You! BLADE! We would join your
ranks! Help you fight Growth![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0015
rows.name:
Think what you could do with my
power and Noborata's wisdom![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0016
rows.name:
Imagine what is possible with
Min'barac's intuition and
Chikochiko's money knowledge![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0017
rows.name:
We will be finest team in all of BLADE.
First we learn. Then we prove ourselves![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0022
rows.name:
I spoke with Zarch Quokett about
new incense to tame Mira's beasts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0023
rows.name:
His solution is quite impressive.
He is cutting-edge beastmaster![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0024
rows.name:
One day, I will tame beast
as powerful as Odsent![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0029
rows.name:
I spoke with Zarch Quokett about
new incense to tame Mira's beasts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0030
rows.name:
But his face twisted in anger
and pain. He said he threw incense
away when Odsent was lost.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045201_MSG0031
rows.name:
It is sad to see great
beastmaster fall so far.[ST:wait ]
